articles.title: Long-Term Outcomes of Transcatheter Aortic Valve Replacement in Low-Flow Low-Gradient Aortic Stenosis: A Reconstructed Time-to-Event and Multivariate Meta-Analysis.
articles.journal: Journal of the American Heart Association
articles.authors: Soltani Moghadam A, Kazemian S, Soltani Moghadam S, Nasiri P, Mojahedi A et al.
articles.key_finding: BACKGROUND: There are uncertainties regarding long-term outcomes of low-flow, low-gradient (LFLG) severe aortic stenosis (AS) following transcatheter aortic valve replacement (TAVR).

articles.title: The effect of chronic total occlusion on outcomes following transcatheter aortic valve implantation: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
articles.authors: Dimitriadis K, Pyrpyris N, Beneki E, Meier D, Papanikolaou A et al.
articles.key_finding: AIM: The pre-procedural presence of chronic total occlusions (CTO) in patients undergoing transcatheter aortic valve implantation (TAVI) could be a significant predictor of outcomes.

articles.title: Cerebral Embolic Protection Devices for Transcatheter Aortic Valve Replacement: A Meta-Analysis and Trial Sequential Analysis.
articles.authors: Elbenawi H, Hassan I, Abdelgalil MS, Hanna M, Almotawally S et al.
articles.key_finding: BACKGROUND: Transcatheter aortic valve replacement (TAVR) is associated with a periprocedural stroke risk due to embolic debris.

articles.title: Impact of transcatheter aortic valve replacement on aortic root remodeling: a pre- and post-procedure CTA comparative analysis.
articles.authors: Liu D, Fan H, Guo H, Wei P, Li M et al.
